conservative.name: Wolfpack Attack
conservative.requirements: Melee weapon equipped, engaged with target and at least 1 ally capable of making a melee attack

success.description: You hit the target for normal damage, using Fellowship rather than Strength to determine damage. One of your engaged allies may immediately perform a Melee Strike action against the same target
As above, and this attack gains +Strength damage

boon.description: The next attack that targets your target gains

chaosStar.description: You and all engaged allies suffer 1 stress

sigmarsComet.description: For every Teamwork card you or your party members have recharging, this attack deals +1 damage

reckless.name: Wolfpack Attack
reckless.requirements: Melee weapon equipped, engaged with target and at least 1 ally capable of making a melee attack

success.description: You hit the target for normal damage. One of your engaged allies may immediately perform a Melee Strike action against the same target
As above, and this attack deals +Fellowship damage

boon.description: The next attack that targets your target gains

chaosStar.description: You and all engaged allies suffer 1 stress

sigmarsComet.description: For every Teamwork card you or your party members have recharging, this attack deals +1 damage
